hierarchy.metric_value: font-mono text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-indigo-600

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but generous internal padding (p-6, p-8)
layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed inset-y-0 left-0 border-r border-gray-200 bg-white z-40
layout.main_content: pl-64 min-h-screen bg-[#F8F9FA] pb-12 pt-8 px-8

surface_styles.card: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surface_styles.header: sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-200 py-4 px-8 flex justify-between items-center

shadcn_customizations.Button: rounded-md font-medium tracking-wide border transition-all duration-200. Primary: bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 border-transparent. Outline: bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50.
shadcn_customizations.Card: rounded-lg border-gray-200 shadow-sm. Use Cardless for dense lists where possible (just border-b separators).
shadcn_customizations.Input: rounded-md border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 bg-white text-gray-900
shadcn_customizations.Table: w-full text-left text-sm text-gray-600. Headers: bg-gray-50 uppercase text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 py-3 px-4. Rows: border-b border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors py-3 px-4.
shadcn_customizations.Badge: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

charting.guideline: Use clean line charts for conversion rates, simple bar charts for revenue recovered. Remove background grid lines, use clean tooltips with 1px borders.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover states. Buttons: darken bg. Cards: subtle lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase (shadow-md).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for colors, shadows, and transforms.

icons_and_media.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight for dashboard precision.

logo.description: Abstract geometric modern logo. Use for the sidebar brand.

avatar_1.description: Professional female avatar for top right user profile.

avatar_2.description: Professional male avatar for secondary profiles or team members.

auth_background.description: A minimalist, high-contrast 3D abstract composition showing a glowing sphere breaking through a clean white grid. Use for the login/signup page split-screen background.

recovered_cart_icon.description: Minimalist 3D icon of a shopping cart with a glowing green checkmark. Use for the 'Recovered Revenue' card or empty state success.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA standards. Ensure secondary text (#6B7280) on gray (#F8F9FA) is readable.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons.
Setup routing for: Dashboard (overview), Abandoned Carts List, Email Recovery Setup, Exit Popup Builder, Store Settings.
Implement the Layout with a fixed Left Sidebar and top header.
Use Recharts for the Analytics Overview (Revenue over time, Abandoned vs Recovered).
Build a clean tabular view for Abandoned Carts with status badges (Pending, Recovered, Lost).
For the Email Setup and Popup Builder, use a split view: Settings/Form on the left, Live Preview Card on the right.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and spacing (p-6, p-8), and use Shadcn only for interactive atomic components (Inputs, Buttons, Tabs, Dialogs).
Add the Auth screen (split view: form on left, the auth_background image on right).
